---
title: "dplyr"
author: "Linda"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
  html_document:
    toc: true
    number_sections: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: cerulean
    code_folding: hide
---

# Unidad de dplyr

## Librerias 

```{r, message=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(palmerpenguins)
library(knitr)
```

## Nombres de las columnas de mi dataset

```{r}
names(penguins)

```

## filter()
```{r}
torgersen_penguins <- penguins %>%
  filter(island == "Torgersen")

head(torgersen_penguins)

bill_depth <- penguins %>%
  filter(bill_depth_mm > 16.2) %>%
  head()
kable(head(torgersen_penguins))

```
